sections.paragraph:
Original: יזואל o

Transliteration: yezav'êl

Phonetic: yez-av-ale'

BDB Definition:

Jeziel = "the assembly of God"
  1. a Benjamite and one of David's mighty warriors who joined him at Ziklag

Origin: from an unused root (meaning to sprinkle) and H410

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
